codebase-rag.name: codebase-rag
codebase-rag.description: RAG pipeline for querying your codebase with natural language
setup: Run: python index.py to index your codebase
Run: python query.py 'your question' to search

docs-rag.name: docs-rag
docs-rag.description: RAG pipeline for querying documentation and markdown files
setup: Run: python index.py to build the index
Run: python query.py 'your question' to search

pdf-rag.name: pdf-rag
pdf-rag.description: RAG pipeline for extracting and querying PDF documents
setup: Run: python index.py to process and index PDFs
Run: python query.py 'your question' to search
